description: Master checklist of fundamental and technical factors for prediction generation. Grows over time via post-mortem analysis of wrong predictions — not correlation-mining. Every factor added must have a causal explanation.

macro_factors.name: Brent Crude ($/bbl)
macro_factors.why_it_matters: Direct input cost driver for refiners and airlines. India imports 90% of crude — affects fiscal deficit, FII sentiment, rupee.

macro_factors.name: USD/INR Exchange Rate
macro_factors.why_it_matters: Weaker rupee = higher import costs (crude, electronics). Benefits IT and pharma exporters who earn in USD.

macro_factors.name: RBI Repo Rate
macro_factors.why_it_matters: Directly sets cost of borrowing. Higher rates compress margins for debt-heavy PSU infra companies and NBFCs.

macro_factors.name: FII Net Flows (CY)
macro_factors.why_it_matters: Sustained FII selling = index headwind regardless of fundamentals. Triggers stop-loss cascades in mid/small caps.

macro_factors.name: DII Net Flows (CY)
macro_factors.why_it_matters: DII buying (SIP inflows, insurance) acts as floor support during FII exits. Net DII-FII gap determines index direction.

macro_factors.name: India PMI (Manufacturing + Services)
macro_factors.why_it_matters: Forward-looking indicator of economic activity. PMI below 50 = contraction. Affects earnings expectations across sectors.

macro_factors.name: India CPI Inflation
macro_factors.why_it_matters: High CPI constrains RBI from cutting rates. Affects consumer purchasing power and FMCG volume growth.

macro_factors.name: Government Capex Budget Utilization (%)
macro_factors.why_it_matters: PSU infra stocks (IRFC, IRCON, NHPC) depend on government spending. Low utilization = order delays = earnings miss.

macro_factors.name: US Fed Funds Rate / Fed Outlook
macro_factors.why_it_matters: Higher US rates = stronger USD = capital outflow from EMs including India. Affects FII flows and rupee directly.

sector_factors.name: Gross Refining Margin (GRM) spread
sector_factors.why_it_matters: GRM = revenue per barrel minus crude cost. When crude spikes and government blocks pass-through, GRM collapses. Primary P&L driver for MRPL.

sector_factors.name: ATF Price (Aviation Turbine Fuel)
sector_factors.why_it_matters: ATF = 35-40% of IndiGo operating cost. Tracks Brent with ~2 week lag. Government has separate excise policy for ATF vs petrol/diesel.

sector_factors.name: India Defence Budget (% of GDP + absolute ₹)
sector_factors.why_it_matters: ASTRA MICRO and shipyards earn from defence orders. Budget allocation + Make-in-India push determines order pipeline.

sector_factors.name: Quick Commerce GMV Growth + Profitability Timeline
sector_factors.why_it_matters: SWIGGY and Zomato valued on path to profitability. GMV growth slowing or competitive intensity rising = multiple compression.

sector_factors.name: Renewable Energy Capex + BESS Orders
sector_factors.why_it_matters: NHPC and ACME SOLAR revenue depends on project commissioning. Government renewable targets drive order flow.

sector_factors.name: Shipbuilding Order Book + Delivery Timeline
sector_factors.why_it_matters: COCHINSHIP revenue is long-duration order book driven. CMA CGM contract and defence vessels are the key near-term deliveries.

sector_factors.name: Coal e-Auction Premium vs Notified Price
sector_factors.why_it_matters: Coal India's realisation per tonne = notified price + e-auction premium. Higher crude = more industrial coal demand = higher premium.

sector_factors.name: Hormuz Strait / Geopolitical Shipping Routes
sector_factors.why_it_matters: Hormuz closure reroutes ships via Cape of Good Hope (+2 weeks transit). Reduces effective fleet capacity = higher freight rates. Affects ADANI PORT volumes.

sector_factors.name: India IT Sector Deal Pipeline + US Tech Spend
sector_factors.why_it_matters: IT revenue tied to US enterprise tech spending. Recession fears or discretionary spend cuts = deal slowdown = earnings downgrade.

technical_factors.name: 52-Week High/Low Proximity (within 5%)
technical_factors.why_it_matters: Stocks near 52wk lows have stop-loss clusters below — a breach triggers forced selling. Near 52wk highs = breakout or resistance.

technical_factors.name: Key Support/Resistance Level Test
technical_factors.why_it_matters: Technically significant price levels concentrate buy/sell orders. A test of support with high volume = decision point.

technical_factors.name: Volume Spike on Breakout/Breakdown (2x avg)
technical_factors.why_it_matters: Price moves on high volume = conviction. Same move on low volume = likely reversal. Volume confirms or questions the thesis.

technical_factors.name: RSI Overbought/Oversold (>75 or <25 on weekly)
technical_factors.why_it_matters: Extreme RSI on weekly timeframe = mean reversion tendency. Most useful for short-term 1D/7D predictions.

technical_factors.name: 50-Day / 200-Day MA Position + Crossover
technical_factors.why_it_matters: Death cross (50 below 200) signals medium-term downtrend. Used for 4W+ predictions. Not useful for 1D/7D.

technical_factors.name: Sector Relative Strength vs Nifty
technical_factors.why_it_matters: A stock can look cheap but if sector is underperforming Nifty, it drags. Relative strength confirms or weakens the individual thesis.

1D.label: 1-Day
1D.purpose: Event-driven — earnings day, RBI policy, results. Fast validation.

7D.label: 7-Day
7D.purpose: Technical thesis — level test, support breach, short-term momentum. Validates in one week.

4W.label: 4-Week
4W.purpose: Catalyst-driven — earnings season, Q4 results impact, FII trend continuation.

2M.label: 2-Month
2M.purpose: Fundamental shift — policy change, earnings cycle, crude trend.

6M.label: 6-Month
6M.purpose: Structural — sector re-rating, macro regime change.

accuracy_thresholds.note: A signal category with <40% accuracy over 8+ predictions triggers post-mortem review. Missing causal factor is identified and added to framework. Not correlation-mining — every new factor must have a fundamental causal explanation.
